variants.title: Fleetguard FS19776 Fuel Filter/Water Sep Spin-On | Replaces the Donaldson P553215
variants.description: Fleetguard® FS19776 fuel water separator spin-on works to remove water and other particulates and ensures clean fuel is delivered to your engine.
specifications: Style: Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On Twist And Drain
Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 15µ @ β100

variants.title: Donaldson P553215 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On Twist And Drain
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P553215 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On Twist And Drain is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On Twist And Drain
Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 15µ @ β100
